name: Wind-up Yuffie
description: Before you stands a rare bloom: the single white rose of Wutai─the one and only Yuffie! Summon your wind-up Yuffie minion.

name: Lite-loader
description: Summon your lite-loader minion. Can move huge loads, a little at a time.

name: Budvi
description: Summon your budvi minion. A bud, buddy, and Nagylvi rolled into one.

name: Wind-up Prishe
description: Summon your wind-up Prishe minion. Ya ready for this?

name: Little Red Viking
description: Summon your little red viking minion. Formerly blue and ruthless.

name: Little Blue Viking
description: Summon your little blue viking minion. Formerly red and vicious.

name: Junior Jinbei
description: Summon your junior jinbei minion. A baby whale shark by any other name would be just as calm and carefree.

name: Senor Otter
description: Summon your Senor Otter minion. An otter and a gentleman.

name: Caprino
description: Summon your caprino minion. So adorable you'll let it get away with anything.

name: Musical Paca
description: Summon your musical paca minion. Has an instrumental burden to carry so never skips leg day.

name: Sweetkit
description: Summon your sweetkit minion. Smells as sweet as it looks.

name: Wind-up Red XIII
description: Summon your wind-up Red XIII. He is that which you see before you. Nothing less.

name: Magic Lamp
description: Summon your magic lamp minion. Phenomenal cosmic powers in an itty-bitty living space.

name: Soothing Sea-beast

sources.text: Trisassant - Old Sharlayan - 12 Pieces of Corvosi Brass

description: Summon your soothing sea-beast minion. To simply behold its pleasing form is to be soothed to the soul.

name: Little Mermaid
description: Summon your little mermaid minion. Wishes to be a little part of your world.

name: Droningway
description: Summon your Droningway minion. No Loporrit will go missing on its watch.

name: G-Warrior MGSD
description: Summon your G-Warrior MGSD minion. The “MGSD” part of its name supposedly stands for “Master Garlond Superior Design,” or something along those lines.

name: Mistic Condor
description: Summon your Mistic condor minion. Feed it only perfectly cooked flesh, lest you incur its displeasure.

name: Gallant Shepherd
description: Summon your gallant shepherd minion. Courageous and loyal, it does credit to caninekind.

name: La Noscean Shorthair
description: Summon your La Noscean shorthair minion. Will hunt rodents for board and lodging.

name: Uma-no-unicolt
description: Summon your uma-no-unicolt minion. Wishes to embark on a journey with one who is pure of heart.

name: Grooving Green
description: Summon your Grooving Green minion. Can you keep up with the rhythm?

name: Vigorwasp
description: Summon your Vigorwasp minion. Rest assured it won't dump its sac of nectar on you.

name: Seikret Fledgling
description: Summon your Seikret fledgling minion. Dreams of the day it attains rugged good looks and colorful feathers.

name: Wind-up Feo Ul
description: Summon your wind-up Feo Ul. As your lovely branch, it will lend you its strength!

name: Wind-up Yok Huy
description: Summon your wind-up Yok Huy minion. Gazes out into eternity with eyes unblinking.

name: Sin Beaver
description: Summon your sin beaver minion. Another mystery better left unsolved.

name: Model Suit
description: Summon your model suit minion. Comes complete with pocket-sized pilot.

name: Falcon-blue Gobtank
description: Summon your falcon-blue gobtank. Stronger than the red one.

name: Raven-red Gobtank
description: Summon your raven-red gobtank. Faster than the blue one.

name: Wind-up Gulool Ja Ja
description: Summon your Gulool Ja Ja minion. It watches your progress with great interest.

name: Micro Crow
description: Summon your micro crow minion. Clever and loyal─what more could one ask for?

name: Sunray Ray
description: Summon your sunray ray minion. Its eyes are up here.

name: Boon Baboon
description: Summon your boon baboon minion. May sound like a generous creature, but don't expect any favors.

name: Wind-up Eald'narche
description: Summon your wind-up Eald'narche minion. After ten long millennia, the dreams of the Zilart will become reality!

name: Gimme Kitten
description: Summon your gimme kitten minion. An ill-mannered winged feline fiend that wants everything.

name: Mini Yan
description: Summon your mini yan minion. A sheep spirit whose child-pleasing form and diminutive size belie its might.

name: Rroneek Calf
description: Summon your rroneek calf minion. Has tusks and horns and isn't afraid to use them.

name: Skallic Uolosapa
description: Summon your Skallic uolosapa minion. A winsome bird with pure white feathers and a pink beak.

name: Tipping Tortoise
description: Summon your tipping tortoise minion. Would be a generous tipper if its coins were real.

name: Deimos
description: Summon your Deimos minion. An entity born of the poison-wielding familiar Phobos. That's the green one.

name: Naiad
description: Summon your Naiad minion. An entity born of the ice-wielding familiar Nereid. That's the purple one.

name: Psamathe
description: Summon your Psamathe minion. An entity born of the fire-wielding familiar Triton. That's the red one.

name: Ja Tiika Leafkin

sources.text: Veerul Ja - Gok Golma (Yak T'el) - 8 Mamool Ja Nanook (Rank 6)

description: Summon your Ja Tiika leafkin minion. What lies beneath its glowing blue leaves is best left a mystery.

name: Micro Rover
description: Summon your micro rover minion. Won't be moving mountains, but can handle pebbles with aplomb.

name: The Deathservant
description: Summon your Deathservant minion. Literally has a taste for life.

name: Clockwork Oppressor
description: Summon your clockwork oppressor. Painted a rugged shade of green, this miniature machina is a scale replica of the full-size model deployed in military training exercises.

name: Royal Hound
description: Summon your royal hound minion. As loyal as it is royal.

name: The Great White Tsuchinoko
description: Summon your Great White Tsuchinoko minion. Delightfully squidgy, and a veritable fountain of good fortune to boot.

name: Wisp of Darkness
description: Summon your wisp of Darkness minion. What it cannot smother, it nibbles. What it cannot nibble, it tickles.

name: The Lawnblazer
description: Summon your Lawnblazer minion. Railroad not required.

name: Tin Soldier S3
description: Summon your tin soldier S3 minion. The toy with a body of tin and a heart of gold.

name: Wind-up Pelupelu
description: Summon your wind-up Pelupelu minion. The perfect souvenir, if it does say so itself.

name: Wind-up Erenville

sources.text: Item code included with The Art of Succession -Relics of Heritage- Artbook

description: Summon your wind-up Erenville minion. Happy to follow rather than guide you for a change.

name: Wind-up Themis
description: Summon your wind-up Themis minion. A minion as loyal as your star is bright─a minion not bound by the confines of this world, or any other.

name: Adamant Weapon
description: Summon your Adamant Weapon minion. A diamond by any other name would shine as bright─at least when scale is accounted for.

name: Toco Toquito
description: Summon your toco toquito minion. A tropical bird that is all beak and has a squawk to match.

name: Spinettesaurus
description: Summon your spinettesaurus minion. Small though it may be, never let it be said that it has no spine.

name: Shshuye
description: Summon your shshuye minion. One day it may become a dread tural vidraal, but it is not this day.

name: Nano Lord
description: Summon your Nano Lord minion. The land probably won't tremble before his might.

name: Brushed-up Krile
description: Summon your brushed-up Krile minion. She is not to be brushed off in the face of danger.

name: Honeysuckler
description: Summon your honeysuckler minion. Doesn't have a taste for blood...yet.

name: Black Kitten
description: Summon your Black Kitten minion. Can you hold your own against her feline ferocity!?

name: Wind-up Garnet
description: Summon your wind-up Garnet minion. She's not alone─she's following you.

name: The Cornservant
description: Summon your Cornservant minion. Will never let you go hungry.

name: Tin Sentry T1
description: Summon your tin sentry T1 minion. It's your own fault if you get hit.

name: Air-wheeler M9
description: Summon your air-wheeler M9 minion. Will whoosh, vroom, and zoom its way into your inner's child heart.

name: Wind-up Zero

sources.text: Item code included with Dawntrail Original Soundtrack

description: Summon your wind-up Zero minion. And thus she is returned.

name: Wind-up Mamool Ja
description: Summon your wind-up Mamool Ja minion. Innocence never looked so adorable.

name: Quetzal
description: Summon your quetzal minion. Do not be fooled by its winsome appearance─you are in the presence of *divinity*.

name: Petit Punutiy
description: Summon your petit punutiy minion. Leading scientists agree: gazing upon a punutiy daily enhances one's sense of well-being.

name: Bluecoat Cat

sources.text: Ryubool Ja - Tuliyollal - 800 Sacks of Nuts

description: Summon your bluecoat cat minion. Surprisingly sweet-tempered despite its regal bearing.

name: Squeak the Coyote
description: Summon your Squeak the Coyote minion. Quiet as a cloud and swift as a lightning bolt when on the prowl.

name: Ilyikty'i

sources.text: Rral Wuruq - Yak T'el - 700 Bicolor Gemstones (Rank 4)

description: Summon your Ilyikty'i minion. A little cub that has aspirations to be a great hunter.

name: Not-so-bighorn
description: Summon your not-so-bighorn minion. The bigger the horns, the brighter the future.

name: Alpaca Cria
description: Summon your alpaca cria minion. Rest assured its spit isn't smelly. Yet.

name: Ambrose the Unfinished
description: Summon your Ambrose the Unfinished minion. Unfinished it may be, but it is certainly not unwilling.

name: Mischief Maker
description: Summon your mischief maker minion. Should only make mischief and not do you one, if the name is to be believed...

name: Speaking Stone
description: Summon your speaking stone minion. Don't even think about getting it started.

name: Tankardtender
description: Summon your tankardtender minion. Rather more manageable than a barrel.

name: Rororrlo Teh
description: Summon your Rororrlo Teh minion. Caution: staring directly at its head may result in temporary blindness.

name: Torgal Pup
description: Summon your Torgal pup minion. Go on, you know you want to pet the adorable fellow. What could possibly go wrong...?

name: Wind-up Zidane
description: Summon your wind-up Zidane minion. Despite appearances, he isn't one for monkeying around.

name: Pegwin
description: Summon your Pegwin minion. You chased after it; now it chases after you.

name: Pink Bean
description: Summon your pink Bean minion. Three, two, one...GO!

name: Uolosapa
description: Summon your uolosapa minion. To fly after you and perch prettily on your head is its divine calling.

name: Repulu
description: Summon your repulu minion. Comes complete with a fetching bow tie to prevent misplacement.

name: Kydonia Strolls
description: Summon your Kydonia Strolls minion. For when you need a stony face to stare at you unflinchingly.

name: Vicarious Vacationer
description: Summon your vicarious vacationer minion. A lean, mean, holidaying machine.

name: Zodiark Idol

sources.text: Item code included with The Art of Resurrection -Beyond the Veil- Artbook

description: Summon your Zodiark idol minion. When you ask your mother if you can have Zodiark, but she says you already have Zodiark at home.

name: Hydaelyn Idol

sources.text: Item code included with Growing Light Original Soundtrack

description: Summon your Hydaelyn idol minion. When you ask your mother if you can have Hydaelyn, but she says you already have Hydaelyn at home.

name: Wind-up Fourchenault

sources.text: Item code included with Encyclopaedia Eorzea III

description: Summon your wind-up Fourchenault minion. Don't even think about dragging it into conflict, or it shall give you a look of sternest disapproval.

name: Wind-up Golbez
description: Summon your wind-up Golbez minion. Too small to conceive of and carry out a mass invasion of the Source...or is he?

name: Tourmaline Weapon
description: Summon your Tourmaline Weapon minion. Stands ready to lend you a helping hand or six.

name: Wind-up Oschon
description: Summon your wind-up Oschon minion. Guaranteed not to wander off on you.

name: Ryunosuke
description: Summon your Ryunosuke minion. Awww, he thinks he's dragons!

name: Wind-up PuPu
description: Summon your wind-up PuPu minion. Will bleed you dry of elixirs if you aren't careful.

name: Kuromaru
description: Summon your Kuromaru minion. Because the only thing that's better than a dog is a *ninja* dog.

name: Shiromaru
description: Summon your Shiromaru minion. Because the only thing that's better than a dog is a *ninja* dog.

name: Okuri Chochin
description: Summon your okuri chochin minion. For those who like a little fright with their light.

name: Goggle-eyed Dogu
description: Summon your goggle-eyed dogu minion. Guaranteed to win any staring contest.

name: Wind-up Athena
description: Summon your wind-up Athena minion. To follow you everywhere─*that* is her wish.

name: Wind-up Barbariccia
description: Summon your wind-up Barbariccia minion. Will blow you away─figuratively.

name: Rubellite Weapon
description: Summon your Rubellite Weapon minion. Scaled down or no, it can scratch you up good.

name: Puffin
description: Summon your puffin minion. Wants to work smarter, not harder.

name: Mossasaurus

sources.text: Near, Far, Wherever Fish Are II

description: Summon your mossasaurus minion. It's adorable now, but wait till it grows up.

name: Posher Otter
description: Summon your posher otter minion. Part futuristic, part antiquated, all class.

name: Chimpanzee
description: This adorable critter will make you love every ape that you see, from chimpan-a to chimpan-z. Summon your chimpanzee minion.

name: Mikra Lyssa
description: Summon your mikra Lyssa minion. Definitely meant to be a wolf─the ancients said so.

name: Exciting Dynamite
description: Summon your exciting dynamite minion. For those who love the threat of death or serious injury to follow their every step.

name: Findingway

sources.text: Coiningway - Hoper's Hold (Mare Lamentorum) - 8 Loporrit Carats (Rank 5)

description: Summon your Findingway minion. Can find his own way without you, but chooses to tag along.

name: Private Pachypodium
description: Summon your private pachypodium minion. Its detonating days are thankfully over.

name: Mama Automaton
description: Summon your Mama automaton minion. Mama knows best. Listen to Mama.

name: Bantam Train

sources.text: Crafted by Armorer - Subaquatic Voyages: Sirensong Sea 5, Bellflower Flood

description: Summon your bantam train minion. It choo-choo-chooses to haunt you.

name: Wind-up Philos
description: Summon your wind-up philos minion. By the by...you see it too, yes?

name: Wind-up Aidoneus
description: Summon your wind-up Aidoneus minion. If sighs could kill, you'd be dead a thousand times over.

name: Wind-up Godbert
description: Summon your wind-up Godbert minion. No less gentlemanly for its compact size, this mammet stands ever ready to do what only a Manderville can.

name: Wind-up Cagnazzo
description: Summon your wind-up Cagnazzo minion. The puddles and ponds are his to command.

name: Suzusaurus

sources.text: Subaquatic Voyages - Sirensong Sea (S), The Lilac Sea (G/O)

description: Summon your suzusaurus minion. Might be able to tow a rowboat to safety if not a galleon.

name: Corgi
description: Summon your corgi minion. Fluffy, full of beans, and fit for a queen.

name: Wind-up Halone
description: Summon your wind-up Halone minion. For those who like it icy cold.

name: Sky Blue Back
description: Born in the Cieldalaes. It was born in the Cieldalaes. It was born in the Cieldalaes. Born in the Cieldalaes. Summon your sky blue back minion.

name: Sewer Skink
description: Summon your sewer skink minion. When it comes to keeping aqueducts free of creepy-crawlies, this lightning-tongued lizard is the hero of the day.

name: Sponge Silkie
description: Summon your sponge silkie minion. This palm-sized cleaning familiar's only purpose is to scrub things until they shine─tabletops, armor, ear canals, you name it.

name: Lumini

sources.text: N-0598 - A-4 Research (Ultima Thule) - 8 Omicron Omnitokens (Rank 5)

description: Summon your lumini minion. This floating ball of fleshy horror was modeled after an Ea who failed to regain full corporeality.

name: Clockwork Cerulean Chaser
description: Summon your clockwork cerulean chaser minion. Painted a stylish shade of blue, this miniature machina is a scale replica of the full-size model deployed in military training exercises.

name: Clockwork Crimson Chaser
description: Summon your clockwork crimson chaser minion. Painted a sleek shade of red, this miniature machina is a scale replica of the full-size model deployed in military training exercises.

name: Felicitous Fuzzball
description: Summon your felicitous fuzzball minion. Its presence is your present, and that's all the effort you're getting from this indolent island mammet.

name: Wind-up Erichthonios
description: Summon your wind-up Erichthonios minion. He'll get them all out. He must.

name: Clockwork Solus
description: Summon your clockwork Solus minion. No lands must remain beyond its grasp. Go forth. Conquer. Rule.

name: Wind-up Scarmiglione
description: Summon your wind-up Scarmiglione minion. Is that hooded gaze regarding you with affection or insatiable hunger? Hard to tell.

name: Pterosquirrel
description: Summon your pterosquirrel minion. Despite its chubby appearance, this bright-eyed companion can glide a surprising distance.

name: Wind-up Arkasodara
description: Summon your wind-up Arkasodara minion. Comes with modesty covered.

name: Wind-up Ragnarok

sources.text: Item code included with The Art of Resurrection -Among The Stars- Artbook

description: Summon your wind-up *Ragnarok* minion. Loporrit crew not included, delightful though that would be.

name: Clockwork Novus D
description: Summon your clockwork Novus D minion. Deftly driven by an unspecified (but doubtless incomparably brilliant) man.

name: Teacup Kapikulu
description: Summon your teacup Kapikulu minion. Small but eager to work.

name: Protonaught
description: Summon your protonaught minion. The amount it can lift would put a full-grown Roegadyn to shame.

name: Blue-footed Booby
description: Summon your blue-footed booby minion. A terror from beak to tailfeather.

name: Chewy
description: Summon your Chewy minion. Take care not to drown in its literal puppy dog eyes.

name: Wind-up Kangaroo
description: Summon your wind-up kangaroo minion. Always has a spring in its step.

name: Wind-up Azeyma
description: Summon your wind-up Azeyma minion. For those who like it scorching hot.

name: Hatching Bunny
description: Summon your hatching bunny minion. If happiness had form, it would look like this.

name: Royal Lunatender
description: Summon your royal lunatender minion. All that glitters is not gold. It could also be a lunatender.

name: Nosferatu
description: Summon your nosferatu minion. Nothing if not gentlemanly...and perhaps bloodthirsty.

name: Wind-up Porom
description: Summon forth your wind-up Porom minion. The rosy cheeks and pronounced eyelashes indicate that this is the female half of a matching pair.

name: Adventure Basket
description: Summon your adventure basket minion. Because no one should have to save the world on an empty stomach.

name: Golden Dhyata
description: Summon your Golden Dhyata minion. Is it a bird? Is it a fish? No, it's a translation device!

name: Optimus Omicron
description: Summon your optimus Omicron minion. Minimum proportions, maximum performance.

name: Starbird
description: Summon your starbird minion. Gazing up at the stars in the heavens, it ever sings a song of hope.

name: Wind-up Vrtra

sources.text: Item code included with Endwalker Original Soundtrack

description: Summon your wind-up Vrtra minion. Last of his brood but certainly not least.

name: Wind-up Herois
description: Summon your wind-up herois minion. Come on, you know who this hero is.

name: Brave New Urianger
description: Summon your brave new Urianger minion. Despite its diminutive size, its arms are no less weapons than those of the man himself.

name: Wind-up Grebuloff
description: Summon your wind-up Grebuloff minion. Smells vaguely like a rocky shore.

name: Caduceus
description: Summon your Caduceus minion. Won't spit acid at you, so rest easy.

name: Crabe de la Crabe
description: Summon your crabe de la crabe minion. If it were any crabbier, it would...probably still be a crab.

name: Hippo Calf
description: Summon your hippo calf minion. Heavy. Assisted lift may be required.

name: Nagxian Cat

sources.text: J'lakshai (Old Sharlayan) / Wilmetta (Radz-at-Han) - 800 Sacks of Nuts

description: Summon your Nagxian cat minion. The very soul of grace and nobility, and can see souls to boot.

name: Flag
description: Summon your Flag minion. A little reindeer with a huge appetite.

name: Squirrel Emperor
description: Summon your squirrel emperor minion. At once more powerful and adorable than a certain simian king.

name: Wind-up Anima
description: Summon your wind-up Anima minion. Warning: cannot be used to teleport or upgrade weapons.

name: Wind-up Magus Sisters
description: Summon your wind-up Magus Sisters minion. Essentially three minions for one, so it represents great value.

name: Wind-up Daivadipa

sources.text: Nesvaaz - Radz-at-Han - 5 Daivadipa's Beads (FATE "Devout Pilgrims vs. Daivadipa" - Thavnair)

description: Summon your wind-up Daivadipa minion. Can discern good and evil─so long as they are at knee height.

name: Greener Gleaner
description: Summon your greener gleaner minion. Good at hiding, but clearly not good enough.

name: Tiny Troll
description: Summon your tiny troll minion. The good kind that makes constructive, well-thought-out comments.

name: Prince Lunatender
description: Summon your Prince Lunatender minion. Use as a decoration at risk of suffering puncture wounds─lots of them.

name: Wee Ea

sources.text: N-1499 - Base Omicron (Ultima Thule) - 500 Bicolor Gemstones (Rank 3)

description: Summon your wee Ea minion. Proof that you don't need to be big to think big.

name: Wind-up Rudy
description: Summon your wind-up Rudy minion. Eager to help, though perhaps not suited to guiding sleighs.

name: Wind-up Gunnhildr
description: Summon your wind-up Gunnhildr minion. Protects her people as a queen, a god, and now a mammet.

name: 9S Automaton
description: Summon your 9S automaton minion. For when you need the company of a compact version of an advanced combat android dressed in a distinctive subculture style.

name: Smaller Stubby
description: Summon your smaller stubby minion. A little rusted but still fit for purpose...whatever that may be.

name: Wind-up Rosa
description: Summon forth your wind-up Rosa minion. Based on the central corner of a one-sided love triangle, if such a thing is possible.

name: Wind-up Rydia
description: Summon forth your wind-up Rydia minion. Not to be confused with a sprig of broccoli.

name: Wind-up Edge
description: Summon forth your wind-up Edge minion. Based on one of the few people who had the chance to be a prince *and* a ninja, which seems like too much fun to squeeze into one lifetime.

name: Wind-up Palom
description: Summon forth your wind-up Palom minion. Try not to break it.

name: Wanderer's Campfire
description: Summon your wanderer's campfire minion. Perfect for driving away the darkness and the chill and, most importantly, toasting marshmallows.

name: Benben Stone

sources.text: Subaquatic Voyages - Sea of Jade (T), Sirensong Sea (E), South Indigo Deep (Q)

description: Summon your Benben stone minion. For when you need the top stone of a pyramid scampering around after you.

name: Magitek Predator F1
description: Summon your magitek predator F1 minion. Comes complete with pilot and stands ready to wreak havoc among the enemy's ranks.

name: Wind-up Runar

sources.text: Item code included with The Art of Reflection -Histories Unwritten- Artbook

description: Summon your wind-up Runar minion. Because a single Runar pining for Master Matoya isn't enough.

name: Wind-up Lyna

sources.text: Item code included with Death Unto Dawn Original Soundtrack

description: Summon your wind-up Lyna minion. Don't forget to salute, or you're liable to receive a dressing-down.

name: Senorita Sabotender

sources.text: 21,000 MGP (only available during the "The Make It Rain Campaign" event)

description: Summon your Senorita Sabotender minion. Like a thousand adorable needles piercing your eyeballs.

name: Gull
description: Summon your gull minion. Has a keen eye for finding schools of fish─and unguarded meals.

name: Dolphin Calf
description: Summon your dolphin calf minion. Has more intelligence in a single winsome flipper than you do in your whole body.

name: Anteater
description: Summon your anteater minion. Definitely not a man-eater, otherwise that's what it would be called...right?

name: Save the Princess
description: Summon your Save the Princess minion. For every person who has ever dreamed of owning a wheeled, spindly legged, trumpet-blowing mammet, there is this wheeled, spindly legged, trumpet-blowing mammet.

name: Trike
description: Summon your Trike minion. Very affectionate, but be prepared to make a quick sidestep if it comes running to greet you.

name: Syldrion-class Insubmersible

sources.text: Subaquatic Voyages - Sea of Jade (M/R), Sirensong Sea (K)

description: Summon your Syldrion-class insubmersible minion. Unlike the craft on which it is modeled, it will break immediately upon coming into contact with water.

name: Wind-up Gaia
description: Summon your wind-up Gaia minion. Those who think the hammer is just for show had best watch their toes.

name: Golden Beaver

sources.text: The Shifting Oubliettes of Lyhe Ghiah

description: Summon your golden beaver minion. Remember: all that glitters is not gold. Sometimes, it is a beaver.

name: Much-coveted Mora
description: Summon forth your much-coveted Mora minion. Few wavekin have ever been the object of so much anticipation, only to be followed by such crushing disappointment.

name: Amaro Hatchling
description: Summon your amaro hatchling minion. It may make a fine steed if you live long enough to see it reach maturity.

name: Drippy
description: Summon your Drippy minion. With a will to wander the world, one wonders whether said world will welcome this well-meaning watery whelp.

name: Dáinsleif F1
description: Summon your Dáinsleif F1 minion. Does not form the head. Or any other part of the body, for that matter.

name: Magitek Helldiver F1
description: Summon your magitek helldiver F1 minion. Minimal firepower, maximum attitude.

name: Petit Pteranodon
description: Summon your petit pteranodon minion. It might be cute now, but wait till it grows and becomes a scourge of the skies.

name: Weatherproof Gaelicat
description: Summon your weatherproof gaelicat minion. Makes you feel toasty warm simply to behold it.

name: 2P Automaton
description: Summon your 2P automaton minion. For when you need the company of a compact version of an advanced combat android dressed in a distinctive subculture style.

name: 2B Automaton
description: Summon your 2B automaton minion. For when you need the company of a compact version of an advanced combat android dressed in a distinctive subculture style.

name: Damona
description: Summon your Damona minion. The daughter of an Oni pirate king.

name: Zazel
description: Summon your Zazel minion. Counselor to generations of Enmas, the Yo-kai kings.

name: Lord Ananta
description: Summon your Lord Ananta minion. The new ruler of the Yo-kai World.

name: Lord Enma
description: Summon your Lord Enma minion. The last in a line of kings who guided the fate of the Yo-kai World.

name: Lalinator 5.H0
description: Summon your Lalinator 5.H0 minion. It doesn't feel pity, or remorse, or fear. And it absolutely will not stop, ever, until you have been lali-ho'd.

name: Allagan Melon
description: Summon your Allagan melon minion. Capable of movement and tremendously juicy.

name: Wind-up Ardbert
description: Summon your wind-up Ardbert minion. What he lacks in size, he makes up for in heart...and his disproportionately large axe.

name: Wind-up Mystel
description: Summon your wind-up Mystel minion. Modeled upon no one in particular. No, really.

name: Sand Fox
description: Summon your sand fox minion. Will perform tricks for a lick of birch syrup.

name: Ephemeral Necromancer
description: Summon your ephemeral necromancer minion. If it could, it would summon forth an army of equally adorable undead.

name: Laladile
description: Summon your Laladile minion. Because small is beautiful.

name: Cerberpup
description: Summon your Cerberpup minion. With three wet little noses and three sets of adorable staring eyes, what's not to love? Aside from all of the teeth, obviously.

name: Malone
description: Summon your Malone minion. If it weren't following you around, it would be tearing hapless adventurers apart on the Diadem.

name: Paissa Threadpuller
description: Summon your paissa threadpuller minion. Currently in training as a weaver, and looks the part.

name: Paissa Patissier
description: Summon your paissa patissier minion. Currently in training as a culinarian, and looks the part.

name: Unlucky Rabbit
description: Summon your unlucky rabbit minion. Has known the bitterest lows and the sweetest highs.

name: Ancient One
description: Summon your ancient one minion. Small and appearing to be fractured, but whole.

name: Little Leafman

sources.text: Sul Lad - Lydha Lran (Il Mheg) - 400 Bicolor Gemstones (Rank 3)

description: Summon your little leafman minion. Definitely a leafman. The pixie said so.

name: Wind-up Dulia-Chai

sources.text: Item code included with The Art of Reflection -Histories Forsaken- Artbook

description: Summon your wind-up Dulia-Chai minion. Complete with asphyxiated Chai-Nuzz.

name: Wind-up Ryne
description: Summon your wind-up Ryne minion. Not merely a palette swap.

name: Silver Dasher

sources.text: Subaquatic Voyages - Sea of Ash (P), Sea of Jade (D/T), Sirensong Sea (C), South Indigo Deep (J)

description: Summon your silver dasher minion. Never was there a bird so adorable.

name: The Major-General

sources.text: No More Fish in the Sea I

description: Summon your Major-General minion. It's a shark. With legs.

name: The Behatted Serpent of Ronka

sources.text: Yuqurl Manl - Hopl's Stopple (The Rak'tika Greatwood) - 8 Qitari Compliments (Rank 8)

description: Summon your Behatted Serpent of Ronka minion. Tremble, child of man, for a creature of purest divinity wiggleth before thee in all of its behatted glory.

name: The Behelmeted Serpent of Ronka

sources.text: Yuqurl Manl - Hopl's Stopple (The Rak'tika Greatwood) - 8 Qitari Compliments (Rank 4)

description: Summon your Behelmeted Serpent of Ronka minion. Tremble, child of man, for a creature of purest divinity wiggleth before thee in all of its behelmeted glory.

name: Sungold Talos

sources.text: The Shifting Oubliettes of Lyhe Ghiah

description: Summon your sungold Talos minion. Guaranteed to make you the envy of collectors and younglings alike.

name: Cute Justice

sources.text: Maudlin Latool Ja - Ul'dah - 400 Allied Seals

description: Summon your Cute Justice minion. Rocket Punch parts may present a choking hazard. Not for children under the age of two.

name: Dress-up Estinien
description: Summon your dress-up Estinien minion. Sun-dried squid not included.

name: Miniature White Knight
description: Summon your miniature white knight minion. Aids in the purging of sickness. Or not.

name: Pod 316
description: Summon your pod 316 minion. The perfect assistant for adventuring...or it would be, if it worked properly.

name: Pod 054
description: Summon your pod 054 minion. The perfect assistant for adventuring...or it would be, if it worked properly.

name: Wind-up Pixie

sources.text: Jul Oul - Lydha Lran (Il Mheg) - 8 Fae Fancies (Rank 6)

description: Summon your wind-up pixie minion. Won't make mischief at your expense─pixie's honor.

name: Wind-up Hobgoblin
description: Summon your wind-up hobgoblin minion. Crafted in the likeness of your mother...or so certain dwarves would say.

name: Domakin
description: Summon your domakin minion. Close, but not a warrior with the body of a mortal and soul of a dragon.

name: Meerkat

sources.text: Subaquatic Voyages - Sea of Ash (M/N/P), Sea of Jade (E/P), Sirensong Sea (B)

description: Summon your meerkat minion. Keeps an eye out for danger while basking in the sun.

name: Little Leannan
description: Summon your little leannan minion. Doesn't see you as food. Yet.

name: Mystic Weapon
description: Summon your mystic weapon minion. Only slightly cursed.

name: Bacon Bits
description: Summon your bacon bits minion. Tastes like bacon...if bacon and clay taste the same to you.

name: Sharksucker-class Insubmersible

sources.text: Subaquatic Voyages - Sea of Ash (E/I/K/R), Sirensong Sea (H)

description: Summon your sharksucker-class insubmersible minion. Warning: do not immerse.

name: Brave New Y'shtola
description: Summon your brave new Y'shtola minion. Not wont to run from her troubles─and couldn't get very far, anyway.

name: Wind-up Fuath
description: Summon your wind-up Fuath minion. Markedly less murderous than the real thing.

name: Eden Minor
description: Summon your Eden Minor minion. Free of sin, though not for lack of trying.

name: Tinker's Bell

sources.text: Fathard - Eulmore - 6 Archaeotania's Horn (FATE "The Head, The Tail, the Whole Damned Thing" - The Tempest)

description: Summon your tinker's bell minion. Said to be named for a pixie...unless you ask the pixies, who adamantly deny that any of their kind would ever have borne such a ludicrous name.

name: Ironfrog Ambler

sources.text: Fathard - Eulmore - 6 Formidable Cog (FATE "A Finale Most Formidable" - Kholusia)

description: Summon your ironfrog ambler minion, a darling, diminutive, dwarven-made...automaton.

name: Wind-up G'raha Tia
description: Summon your wind-up G'raha Tia minion. The future is where his destiny awaits.

name: Wind-up Fran
description: Summon your wind-up Fran minion. Stilettos guaranteed not to impede progress through markedly rough terrain such as jungles, bogs, and abandoned monasteries serving as prisons for extra-dimensional forces of evil.

name: Wind-up Suzaku

sources.text: Item code included with Shadowbringers Original Soundtrack

description: Summon your wind-up Suzaku minion, complete with her flute and her senses.

name: Wind-up Nu Mou

sources.text: Xylle (The Crystarium) / Ilfroy (Eulmore) - 800 Sacks of Nuts

description: Summon your wind-up Nu Mou minion. So cuddlesome it hurts.

name: Giant Beaver

sources.text: Giant Beaver - Il Mheg - 1 Dancing Wing (Requires Quest "And Then There Were None")

description: Summon your giant beaver minion, a mystery better left unsolved.

name: Shoebill
description: Summon your shoebill minion, an unflappable bird possessed of a regal air...or perhaps simply a condescending one.

name: Bitty Duckbill

sources.text: Xylle (The Crystarium) / Ilfroy (Eulmore) - 800 Sacks of Nuts

description: Summon your bitty duckbill minion. Do not attempt to put on your feet.

name: Butterfly Effect

sources.text: Nacille - Fanow (The Rak'tika Greatwood) - 400 Bicolor Gemstones (Rank 3)

description: Summon your butterfly effect minion. Illusory and therefore incapable of invoking any history-shattering consequences...right?

name: The Great Serpent of Ronka
description: Summon your Great Serpent of Ronka minion. Tremble, child of man, for a creature of purest divinity wiggleth before thee.

name: Chameleon
description: Summon your chameleon minion and marvel as it melts into your surrounds.

name: Black Hayate
description: Summon your black hayate minion. Gaze upon the visage of a ruthless killer.

name: Wind-up Omega-F
description: Summon your wind-up Omega-F minion to test the efficacy of combat role allocation.

name: Wind-up Omega-M
description: Summon your wind-up Omega-M minion to observe your irrational behavior.

name: Forgiven Hate
description: Summon your forgiven hate minion. Having repented its sins, it poses no danger.

name: Tiny Echevore
description: Summon your tiny echevore minion. Its tail tastes like nectar...but you wouldn't know such things.

name: Clionid Larva
description: Summon your clionid larva minion, small on size but massive on appetite.

name: Micro Gigantender
description: Summon your micro gigantender minion. Is it small or is it big? You be the judge.

name: Armadillo Bowler
description: Summon your armadillo bowler minion. Possessed of a superior sense of balance.

name: Zephyrous Zabuton

sources.text: Shikitahe - Tamamizu (The Ruby Sea) - 5 Kojin Sango (Rank 9)

description: Summon your zephyrous zabuton minion. More pushing for another cushion.

name: Dress-up Tataru

sources.text: Item code included with The Art of the Revolution -Eastern Memories-

description: Summon your dress-up Tataru minion. Say what you will, she wears it well.

name: Wind-up Qalyana

sources.text: Madhura - Castellum Velodyna (The Fringes) - 7 Ananta Dreamstaves (Rank 9)

description: Summon your wind-up Qalyana minion. She may or may not break through the borderline.

name: Wind-up Redback

sources.text: Shikitahe - Tamamizu (The Ruby Sea) - 5 Kojin Sango (Rank 9)

description: Summon your wind-up Redback minion. Don't tell mom the Kojin minion's red.

name: Yukinko Snowflake
description: Summon your yukinko snowflake minion. Falling, falling, falling, falling, falling...falling on his head.

name: Conditional Virtue

sources.text: The Baldesion Arsenal (Eureka Hydatos) - Absolute Virtue Chest

description: Summon your Conditional Virtue minion. Cuddle not to dullness; coddle not to elevation.

name: Wind-up Ramza
description: Summon your wind-up Ramza minion. Stands ready to fight for truth, justice, and the Ivalician way.

name: Wind-up Aerith
description: Summon your wind-up Aerith minion. The future ith not only yourth.

name: Wind-up Cloud
description: Summon your wind-up Cloud minion. Sharp hair, don't care.

name: Minitek Conveyor
description: Summon your minitek conveyor minion. The latest in miniature transport technology.

name: Wind-up Weapon
description: Summon your wind-up weapon minion. Somewhat buggy.

name: Wind-up Elvaan

sources.text: FATE "You Do Know Jack" - Eureka Pyros

description: Summon your wind-up Elvaan minion. Remarks relating to a certain people's perpetually dour facial expressions are best kept to oneself.

name: Seitei

sources.text: Crafted by Weaver - The Wreath of Snakes (Extreme)

description: Summon your Seitei minion. Dragon-ness is in the eye of the beholder.

name: Abroader Otter

sources.text: Subaquatic Voyages - Deep-sea Site (W), Sea of Ash (F/G/Q), Sea of Jade (A)

description: Summon your abroader otter minion. Hobbies include playing and having fun on an island in the sun.

name: Hedgehoglet
description: Summon your hedgehoglet minion. Only your selfless love and affection can keep him blissfully dilemma-free.

name: Baby Gremlin
description: Summon your baby gremlin minion. Feeding after midnight may result in injury. Yours.

name: Dhalmel Calf
description: Summon your dhalmel calf minion. Oddly short yet alarmingly tall.

name: Wind-up Tifa
description: Summon your wind-up Tifa minion. Not the wrong person.

name: Little Yang
description: Summon your Little Yang minion. Every now and then he gets a little bit closer.

name: Little Yin
description: Summon your Little Yin minion. Turn around.

name: Wind-up Alpha
description: Summon your wind-up Alpha minion. Kweh-ing along under some distant sky.

name: Scarlet Peacock
description: Summon your scarlet peacock minion. Prettier than your average peacock, and several times as flammable.

name: Capybara Pup
description: Summon your capybara pup minion. Loves bath time, and you.

name: OMG
description: Summon your OMG minion. Weird. Technological. Fascinating.

name: Mudpie
description: Summon your mudpie minion. At last, portable filth.

name: Bridesmoogle

sources.text: Attend a Ceremony of Eternal Bonding (Gold/Platinum)

description: Summon your bridesmoogle minion. What is a blushing bride without a dutiful bridesmoogle to scatter petals in her general vicinity?

name: Taoist Moogle
description: Summon your Taoist moogle minion. The mogpath that can be spoken of is not the true mogpath, kupo.

name: Poogie
description: Summon your Poogie minion. Beloved by hunters, though the feeling is not always mutual.

name: Palico

sources.text: The New King on the Block

description: Summon your Palico minion. Very punny.

name: Wind-up Tarutaru
description: Summon your wind-up Tarutaru minion. Remarks relating to a certain people's stature and the diminutiveness thereof are best kept to oneself.

name: Copycat Bulb
description: Summon your copycat bulb minion. The only companion you need if you want no other companions.

name: Wind-up Cirina
description: Summon your wind-up Cirina minion. Hungry for divine guidance. Also buuz.

name: Frilled Dragon

sources.text: Confederate Custodian - Crick (The Ruby Sea) - 10 Empyrean Potsherds

description: Summon your frilled dragon minion. Also known as the *chlamydosaurus* but...uh, yeah.

name: Clockwork Lantern
description: Summon your clockwork lantern minion. Hands-free illumination for the busy insomniac.

name: Wind-up Sadu
description: Summon your wind-up Sadu minion. Will most likely not call any of your companions a stunted chuluu.

name: Wind-up Magnai
description: Summon your wind-up Magnai minion. Ever in search of true love.

name: Wind-up Zhloe
description: Summon your wind-up Zhloe minion. Cannot thank you enough, but will certainly try.

name: Wind-up Tsukuyomi

sources.text: Item code included with Stormblood Original Soundtrack

description: Summon your wind-up Tsukuyomi minion. Barren waters, heed unto the tide.

name: Attendee #777

sources.text: Gyosho - Dhoro Iloh (The Azim Steppe) - 7 Namazu Koban (Rank 4)

description: Summon your attendee #777 minion. Wasshoi, yes, yes.

name: Construct 8
description: Summon your Construct 8 minion. Batteries not included.

name: Monkey King
description: Summon your magic monkey minion. King of monkeys. Equal of heaven. Inspirer of “awww.”

name: Wind-up Mithra
description: Summon your wind-up Mithra minion. Opinions on how Miqo'te rate compared to their supposed ancestors are best kept to oneself.

name: The Prince of Anemos

sources.text: FATE "The Shadow over Anemos" - Eureka Anemos

description: Summon your Prince of Anemos minion. Cute and cudgely.

name: Wind-up Fafnir
description: Summon your wind-up Fafnir minion. Protective eyewear highly recommended.

name: Private Moai

sources.text: Subaquatic Voyages - Deep-Sea Site (I), Sea of Ash (T), Sea of Jade (B)

description: Summon your private moai minion. It's watching you, watching you, watching you.

name: Motley Egg
description: Summon your motley egg minion. The tiny Archon inside is certain to kickstart your heart.

name: Wind-up Yotsuyu

sources.text: Item code included with The Art of the Revolution -Western Memories-

description: Summon your wind-up Yotsuyu minion. For that delicious disdain you never knew you needed.

name: Byakko Cub

sources.text: Crafted by Weaver - The Jade Stoa (Extreme)

description: Summon your Byakko cub minion. Got to be the fuzziest.

name: Wind-up Ananta

sources.text: Madhura - Castellum Velodyna (The Fringes) - 7 Ananta Dreamstaves (Rank 4)

description: Summon your wind-up Ananta minion. Why did it have to be a snake?

name: The Gold Whisker
description: Summon your Gold Whisker minion. Beckons you to enter his barrel of sin, but don't go in.

name: Aurelia Polyp

sources.text: Subaquatic Voyages - Deep-sea Site (E/G/K/S/U/AA), Sea of Ash (S), Sea of Jade (C), Sirensong Sea (I)

description: Summon your aurelia polyp minion. Lighter than air─er...water.

name: Komainu
description: Summon your komainu minion. Part lion, part dog, all lion-dog.

name: White Whittret
description: Summon your white whittret minion. Once you pop...

name: Wind-up Kefka
description: Summon your wind-up Kefka minion. Just can't believe it? Believe it!

name: Tengu Doll
description: Summon your tengu doll minion. And you know what they say about the size of a doll's nose.

name: Wind-up Hien
description: Summon your wind-up Hien minion. Be proud, my new owner. Be proud.

name: Dress-up Raubahn
description: Summon your dress-up Raubahn minion. Detachable arm optional.

name: Wind-up Shinryu

sources.text: Crafted by Weaver - The Minstrel Balad: Shinryu's Domain

description: Summon your wind-up Shinryu minion. Exhibits an almost preternatural urge to hide in treasure chests and guard powerful weapons.

name: Wind-up Ravana

sources.text: Crafted by Weaver - Thok ast Thok (Extreme)

description: Summon your wind-up Ravana minion. Low on low he stands, gazing up to see.

name: Wind-up Kojin

sources.text: Shikitahe - Tamamizu (The Ruby Sea) - 5 Kojin Sango (Rank 5)

description: Summon your wind-up Kojin minion. Is it green? Is it blue? Or...is it neither?

name: Axolotl Eft
description: Summon your axolotl eft minion. Because there truly is nothing more adorable than an oddly Lalafellin face on the body of a moist, frilled salamander.

name: Salt & Pepper Seal
description: Summon your salt & pepper seal minion. What a seal, what a mighty good seal.

name: Koala Joey
description: Summon your koala joey minion. Shows no signs of stress or crotch rot, so hug away.

name: Mameshiba
description: Summon your mameshiba minion. Who let the newborn miniature Far Eastern canine specimen out? Who, who, who, who, who!?

name: Wind-up Ixion

sources.text: Eschina - Rhalgr's Reach - 5 Ixion Horns (FATE "A Horse Outside" - The Lochs)

description: Summon your wind-up Ixion minion. A horse is a horse, of course. Except when it is Ixion.

name: Wind-up Matanga
description: Summon your wind-up Matanga minion. This is not Matanga. Matanga is graceful.

name: Wind-up Gosetsu
description: Summon your wind-up Gosetsu minion. Wanted by the Empire...and good little boys and girls across Othard.

name: Wind-up Lyse
description: Summon your wind-up Lyse minion. Most certainly not a repurposed wind-up Yda.

name: Wind-up Namazu
description: Summon your wind-up Namazu minion. Half cat. Half fish. All fish.

name: Wind-up Exdeath
description: Summon your wind-up Exdeath minion. Most maniacal tree beings bent on world domination are usually not intimidated by turtles. This one is.

name: Wind-up Bartz
description: Summon your wind-up Bartz minion. I like small Bartz and I cannot lie.

name: Wind-up Red Mage
description: Summon your wind-up red mage minion. He'd rather be red than dead.

name: Magitek Avenger F1
description: Summon your magitek avenger F1 minion. Avenger, assembled!

name: Wind-up Chimera
description: Summon your wind-up chimera minion. Crafted by piecing together the remnants of unsold automata.

name: Mock-up Grynewaht
description: Summon your mock-up Grynewaht minion. Bwahahahaha!

name: Wind-up Khloe
description: Summon your wind-up Khloe minion. Because there is nothing wrong with a fully automated mechanical reconstruction of a young girl of three and ten summers.

name: Dress-up Yugiri
description: Summon your dress-up Yugiri minion. One Yugiri is never enough.

name: Wind-up Lakshmi
description: Summon your wind-up Lakshmi minion. Your, your, your serpentine.

name: Wind-up Susano

sources.text: Crafted by Weaver - The Pool of Tribute (Extreme)

description: Summon your wind-up Susano minion. If the Kojin believe that within every item resides a deity, then who exactly resides inside this automaton?

name: Wind-up Bismarck

sources.text: Crafted by Weaver - The Limitless Blue (Extreme)

description: Summon your wind-up Bismarck minion. The hairiest whale you will see this fortnight.

name: Wind-up Meateater
description: Summon your wind-up meateater minion. Watch out boys, he'll (literally) chew you up.

name: Road Sparrow
description: Summon your road sparrow minion. This house sparrow's home is on the road. Sparrow.

name: Ghido
description: Summon your Ghido minion. There is most likely a logical explanation as to why this aged turtle can navigate the skies. Most likely.

name: Odder Otter
description: Summon your odder otter minion. Is there anything odder than an otter who lives out of water?

name: Bom Boko
description: Summon your Bom Boko minion. An adorable raccoon dog pup with a big heart and even bigger testicles.

name: Tora-jiro
description: Summon your Tora-jiro minion. His name suggests that this tiny tiger cub has an older brother. His parents deny everything.

name: Fox Kit

sources.text: Eschina - Rhalgr's Reach - 3 Sassho-seki Fragments (FATEs "Outfoxed" and "Foxy Lady" - Yanxia)

description: Summon your fox kit minion. His devotion toward you will prove fair and balanced.

name: Ivon Coeurlfist Doll
description: Summon your Ivon Coeurlfist doll minion. Technically “Coeurl*paw*.”

name: Bombfish
description: Summon your bombfish minion. He will give you an offer that can't be defused.

name: Tiny Tatsunoko
description: Summon your tiny tatsunoko minion. If the Hingan word for sea horse is tatsunoko, would that make this a sea pony? *Your* little sea pony?

name: Castaway Chocobo Chick
description: Summon your castaway chocobo chick minion. Currently without a name. “Wilson” recommended.

name: Pegasus Colt
description: Summon your pegasus colt minion. Unfortunately does not emit rainbows from any of its orifices.

name: Baby Brachiosaur
description: Summon your baby brachiosaur minion.

name: Wind-up Hraesvelgr

sources.text: Item code included with The Art of Ishgard -The Scars of War-

description: Summon your wind-up Hraesvelgr minion. Comes complete with overhead nameplate to help with spelling.

name: Faepup
description: Summon your faepup minion. Every dog has its fae.

name: Hellpup

sources.text: Mama Said Knock You Out III

description: Summon your hellpup minion. Not all children are products of their environment. This one, however, is.

name: Wind-up Yuna
description: Summon your wind-up Yuna minion. “My will is strong!” So is this automaton's resistance to rust.

name: Wind-up Moon

sources.text: Magic Pot - The Isles of Umbra (Western La Noscea) - 1 Hi-Elixir

description: Summon your wind-up moon minion. /poke to adjust elevation. /point to inform others of its location. /blowkiss to get strange looks from passersby.

name: Anima
description: Summon your anima minion. From your heart and from your hand. Finally people will understand your intentions.

name: Angel of Mercy
description: Summon your angel of mercy minion. Come and save me tonight.

name: Gigi

sources.text: If I Could Turn Back Time

description: Summon your Gigi minion. Also known as Vivi...but his secret is safe with you.

name: Wind-up Nidhogg

sources.text: Item code included with The Far Edge of Fate Original Soundtrack

description: Summon your wind-up Nidhogg minion. Now with more eyes.

name: Wind-up Estinien
description: Summon your wind-up Estinien minion. Absolutely, positively not possessed by an evil dragon bent on ridding the world of mankind.

name: Wind-up Ohl Deeh

sources.text: Mogmul Mogbelly - Bahrr Lehs (The Churning Mists) - 30,000 Gil (Rank 9)

description: Summon your wind-up Ohl Deeh minion. 100% less subject to violent mood swings than its living counterpart.

name: Wind-up Scathach
description: Summon your wind-up Scathach minion. Surprisingly visible despite being a queen of the shadows.

name: Bullpup
description: Summon your bullpup minion. Runt of the canis pugnaces litter.

name: Wind-up Lulu
description: Summon your wind-up Lulu minion. “Magic has no limits.” Nor does the list of exciting things you can do with this automaton.

name: Wind-up Rikku
description: Summon your wind-up Rikku minion. “Victory is ours!” This automaton is yours.

name: Namingway

sources.text: Item code included with Encyclopaedia Eorzea

description: Summon your Namingway minion. Do not think this means you can now change your character name.

name: Wind-up Edda

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Iron/Silver/Gold Sack

description: Summon your wind-up Edda minion. Because true love never dies.

name: Wind-up Moenbryda

sources.text: An Ending to Mark a New Beginning

description: Summon your wind-up Moenbryda minion. Destined to die a hero...and live on as a mechanized servitor.

name: Dress-up Alisaie
description: Summon your dress-up Alisaie minion. Now 120% more discernable from the wind-up Alphinaud minion.

name: Dress-up Thancred
description: Summon your dress-up Thancred minion. Take a walk on Thancred's wild side...but with fewer nutkins.

name: Toy Alexander

sources.text: Alexander - The Soul of the Creator
Alexander - The Soul of the Creator (Savage)

description: Summon your toy Alexander minion. A special something for all good Illuminati gobs and girls.

name: Shaggy Shoat
description: Summon your shaggy shoat minion. This adorable piglet will gore your heart and leave you yearning for more.

name: Continental Eye
description: Summon your Continental eye minion. I see you. You see me.

name: USApyon
description: Summon your USApyon minion. A Yo-kai who aims for the moon.

name: Robonyan F-type
description: Summon your Robonyan F-type minion. It's an upgraded robot that thinks it's a cat.

name: Hovernyan
description: Summon your Hovernyan minion. He may be a wanderer, but he's actually quite dependable.

name: Shogunyan
description: Summon your Shogunyan minion. This legendary warrior's armor smells faintly of tuna.

name: Venoct
description: Summon your Venoct minion. All of his abilities are truly first class.

name: Noko
description: Summon your Noko minion. This Yo-kai is one lucky snake!

name: Manjimutt
description: Summon your Manjimutt minion. He hopes to become a CEO someday.

name: Komajiro
description: Summon your Komajiro minion. He might as well tag along on your adventures as he searches for his older brother.

name: Kyubi
description: Summon your Kyubi minion. He's actually quite charming once you get to know him.

name: Blizzaria
description: Summon your Blizzaria minion. She's a Yo-kai with an immense chilling power.

name: Whisper
description: Summon your Whisper minion. Your very own Yo-kai butler, at your service.

name: Komasan
description: Summon your Komasan minion. He got bored with guarding his shrine. Now he wants to guard you.

name: Jibanyan
description: Summon your Jibanyan minion. He might take his anger out on passing vehicles.

name: Wind-up Krile
description: Summon your wind-up Krile minion. She is terribly, terribly sorry to have kept you waiting.

name: Dress-up Y'shtola
description: Summon your dress-up Y'shtola minion. Now with more aetheric...enhancements?

name: Hecteye
description: Summon your hecteye minion. Got no Hyuran grace, you're an eye without a face.

name: Wind-up Sasquatch
description: Summon your wind-up sasquatch minion. It thankfully cannot pelt you with its steaming stool.

name: Piggy
description: Summon your Piggy minion. Many have tried casting Esuna on what they thought was a struggling adventurer, only to find they had wasted their magic.

name: Magic Bucket
description: Summon your magic bucket minion. A fisherman's best friend. He sloshes instead of slobbers.

name: Wind-up Cheerleader
description: Summon your wind-up cheerleader minion. Oh, I think that you've found yourself a cheerleader.

name: Wind-up Aymeric
description: Summon your wind-up Aymeric minion. His many obligations prevent him from accompanying you on your journeys, but hopefully this dutiful substitute will suffice.

name: Wind-up Shiva

sources.text: Crafted by Weaver - The Akh Afah Amphitheatre (Extreme)

description: Summon your wind-up Shiva minion. Renounce the hatreds that consume you, and she will scatter them like sawdust into the wind.

name: Wind-up Ramuh
description: Summon your wind-up Ramuh minion. He's silently judging you.

name: Wind-up Dragonet

sources.text: Mogmul Mogbelly - Bahrr Lehs (The Churning Mists) - 30,000 Gil (Rank 7)

description: Summon your wind-up dragonet minion. For the adventurer who has always longed to be a mother of dragons.

name: Dwarf Rabbit
description: Summon your dwarf rabbit minion. He may have a penchant for nibbling at your neighbor's garden patches.

name: Wind-up Calofisteri
description: Summon your wind-up Calofisteri minion. She seems so peaceful. Why don't you keep her with you...FOR ALL ETERNITY!

name: Calamari
description: Summon your calamari minion. (Or is it a trap!?)

name: Doman Magpie
description: Summon your Doman magpie minion. Approximately 3.14159 times more intelligent than the average swallow.

name: Panda Cub
description: Summon your panda cub minion. Untrained in arts both martial and magical, but as scrumptiously adorable as chicken glazed in a tangy orange reduction.

name: Spoony Bard

sources.text: Item code included with Heavensward Original Soundtrack

description: Summon your spoony bard minion. Although there are many different accounts of what was actually said during the famous altercation, all agree on the single utterance that became his legacy.

name: Wind-up Nero tol Scaeva
description: Summon your wind-up Nero tol Scaeva minion. Better engineered than the wind-up Cid. In every way.

name: Wind-up Leviathan
description: Summon your wind-up Leviathan minion. Your flesh cannot feed this minion of the deep.

name: Wind-up Titan
description: Summon your wind-up Titan minion. Placing this puppet on an elevated surface may compel it to knock everything else to the ground.

name: Wind-up Garuda

sources.text: Crafted by Weaver - The Howling Eye (Hard)

description: Summon your wind-up Garuda minion. Hopefully she will not HEEHEE haha HEEE!!! too loudly in your ear.

name: Wind-up Gnath

sources.text: Vath Stickpeddler - Loth ast Vath (The Dravanian Forelands) - 30,000 Gil (Rank 7)

description: Summon your wind-up Gnath minion. <click> <click> He will obey.

name: Wind-up Vath

sources.text: Vath Stickpeddler - Loth ast Vath (The Dravanian Forelands) - 30,000 Gil (Rank 4)

description: Summon your wind-up Vath minion. <click> <click> He seeks purpose. So he will follow you. Everywhere.

name: Faustlet

sources.text: Alexander - The Burden of the Son (Savage)

description: Summon your faustlet minion. He will shelter you from the sturms.

name: Fenrir Pup
description: Summon your Fenrir pup minion. This stray hoarhound pup is as feisty as the leader of his pack, and just as aloof.

name: Poro Roggo
description: Summon your Poro Roggo minion. Enchanted familiar though it may be, kissing it will do nothing to alter its corporeal form.

name: Morpho
description: Summon your morpho minion. With blue wings practically glowing, this butterfly feels almost like a spirit. Almost.

name: Brina
description: Summon your Brina minion. Collectors warn that one who wishes to complete the set should be well versed in the art of combat.

name: Calca
description: Summon your Calca minion. Whether she is cute or creepy has been oft debated, but all agree it is best not to leave her to her own devices.

name: Wind-up Relm

sources.text: Item code included with The Art of Ishgard -Stone and Steel-

description: Summon your wind-up Relm minion. Come on now, you stubborn old bag of bones!

name: Wind-up Haurchefant

sources.text: As Goes Light, So Goes Darkness

description: Summon your wind-up Haurchefant minion. What isn't dead (or is recreated in a goldsmith's workshop) can never die.

name: Wind-up Ifrit

sources.text: Crafted by Weaver - The Bowl of Embers (Hard)

description: Summon your wind-up Ifrit minion. It doesn't bleed. You cannot kill it. (But you may discard it at your leisure.)

name: Wind-up Zundu Warrior

sources.text: Luna Vanu - Ok' Gundu Nakki (The Sea of Clouds) - 30,000 Gil (Rank 7)

description: Summon your wind-up Zundu warrior minion. Like a spring wind, the Zundu warrior is strong...until he winds down.

name: Wind-up Gundu Warrior

sources.text: Luna Vanu - Ok' Gundu Nakki (The Sea of Clouds) - 30,000 Gil (Rank 4)

description: Summon your wind-up Gundu warrior minion. He weighs far less than he appears.

name: Wind-up Illuminatus
description: Summon your wind-up Illuminatus minion. Comes complete with two hands, both blue as an Illuminati baby's bum.

name: Penguin Prince
description: Summon your penguin prince minion. An empire awaits.

name: Hunting Hawk
description: Summon your hunting hawk minion. She loves you more than life itself. She's had to.

name: Wind-up Echidna
description: Summon your wind-up Echidna minion. A remarkably lifelike recreation of the shape-shifting seductress. Perhaps a tad *too* lifelike...

name: Clockwork Twintania
description: Summon your clockwork Twintania minion. Another advanced Allagan creation. Is there anything the Allagans couldn't create? The Allagans are believed to have created an instrument to answer this very question.

name: Korpokkur Kid
description: Summon your korpokkur kid minion. For best results, keep moist at all times.

name: Shalloweye
description: Summon your shalloweye minion. Please refrain from staring.

name: Paissa Brat

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack

description: Summon your paissa brat minion. The eyes of a newborn paissa are said to see only the truth. The truth and food.

name: Wind-up Firion
description: Summon your wind-up Firion minion. Free is a very good price.

name: Wind-up Yugiri
description: Summon your wind-up Yugiri minion, her mask no longer holding any mystery.

name: Pumpkin Butler
description: Summon your Pumpkin Butler minion. Oft-forgotten member of the Mandragoras, if the Pumpkin Butler harbors any ill will for those who have so easily forsaken him, he does a fine job of hiding it.

name: Wind-up Iceheart
description: Summon your wind-up Iceheart minion. Too hot to handle, too cold to hold.

name: Wind-up Tataru
description: Summon your wind-up Tataru minion and prepare to have your heart melt.

name: Wind-up Alisaie
description: Summon your wind-up Alisaie minion. For those who believe the better half deserves more time in the spotlight.

name: Steam-powered Gobwalker G-VII
description: Summon your steam-powered gobwalker G-VII minion. Exhaust can be used to steam hams.

name: Wind-up Kain
description: Summon your wind-up Kain minion. A few moments may be needed to allow him to regain control of himself.

name: Clockwork Barrow
description: Summon your clockwork barrow minion and take a load off your shoulders.

name: Gold Rush Minecart

sources.text: FATE "On Dangerous Ground" - The Sea of Clouds

description: Summon your gold rush minecart minion. It is, unsurprisingly, void of gold.

name: Accompaniment Node
description: Summon your accompaniment node minion and marvel at the advanced accompaniment technology of the Allagan Empire.

name: Heliodor Carbuncle

sources.text: Item code included with Topaz Carbuncle Plushie

description: Summon your Heliodor Carbuncle minion. If ever unfaithful, return for a full refund.

name: Peridot Carbuncle

sources.text: Item code included with Emerald Carbuncle Plushie

description: Summon your Peridot Carbuncle minion. If ever unfaithful, return for a full refund.

name: Wind-up Cid
description: Summon your wind-up Cid minion. When asked, if he had a granddaughter, what would he like to see her named, the Ironworks founder replied, “Gertrude.”

name: Wind-up Alphinaud
description: Summon your wind-up Alphinaud minion. Perfect for international summits, family get-togethers, pre- or post-battle gatherings, or any other occasion where the recapitulation of past occurrences is absolutely, positively necessary.

name: Ugly Duckling

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack

description: Summon your ugly duckling minion. Will he turn into a graceful swan? Inquiring minds want to know.

name: Owlet

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack

description: Summon your owlet minion. Who needs eyes in the back of their head when you can spin your head full circle?

name: Gestahl
description: Summon Gestahl. He's a cute puppy dog. Yes, he is. Yes, he is a cute puppy dog. A cute puppy dog, yes, he is. Awww, such a cute puppy dog... Yes...

name: Lesser Panda

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack

description: Summon your lesser panda minion. Lesser only in size to normal pandas. And in life expectancy. And intelligence. And fluffiness. Well, perhaps not fluffiness.

name: Unicolt

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack

description: Summon your unicolt minion. Because two horns are not always better than one.

name: Griffin Hatchling

sources.text: Ardolain - The Forgotten Knight (Ishgard) - 400 Centurio Seals

description: Summon your griffin hatchling minion. Not to be confused with a gryphon hatchling, a griffon hatchling, a gryfon hatchling, or a gryphus hatchling.

name: Iron Dwarf
description: Summon your iron dwarf minion (though he prefers the term “little iron person”).

name: Page 63

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack

description: Summon your page 63 minion. A detailed recapitulation of the preceding sixty-two pages is not necessary to fully enjoy the content of the sixty-third.

name: Gaelikitten

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack

description: Summon your gaelikitten minion. Rumors that the gods kill one of these adorable creatures every time a young man thinks pleasurable thoughts are unfounded.

name: Atrophied Atomos

sources.text: Crafted by Alchemist - Timeworn Wyvernskin Map

description: Summon your atrophied Atomos minion. Putting money where this voidsent's mouth is merely results in devoured money.

name: Behemoth Heir

sources.text: Ardolain - The Forgotten Knight (Ishgard) - 400 Centurio Seals

description: Summon your behemoth heir minion, currently forty-seventh in line to the behemoth throne.

name: Set of Primogs

sources.text: Item code included with Before the Fall Original Soundtrack

description: Summon your set of Primogs minion, the *only* mechanical musicians this side of Black Tea Brook...making them the *greatest* mechanical musicians this side of Black Tea Brook.

name: Chocobo Chick Courier
description: Summon your chocobo chick courier minion. It may not be in your best interest to entrust him with any important missives just yet.

name: Water Imp
description: Summon your water imp minion. Legend states these strange creatures can only survive on land as long as the plate atop their heads remains wet.

name: Black Coeurl
description: Summon your black coeurl minion. Beware, for if one should cross your path, you will experience seven years of...AWWWWWW.

name: Model Magitek Bit

sources.text: Crafted by Blacksmith - The Binding Coil of Bahamut -Turn 1, 2, 4 and 5

description: Summon your model magitek bit minion. An exact 1:9 scale replica of a ceruleum-powered magitek bit (Ultima Weapon action figure not included).

name: Midgardsormr
description: Summon Midgardsormr. Not the big one. The little one.

name: Enkidu
description: Summon your Enkidu minion. That green is not coming out, even with multiple washings.

name: Wind-up Gentleman
description: Summon your wind-up gentleman minion. If “clockwork Hildibrand” doesn't quite roll off the tongue, both “minion of enquiry” and “mammet extraordinaire” are acceptable alternatives.

name: Puff of Darkness
description: Summon your puff of Darkness minion. When standing nearby, prithee refrain from coughing, sneezing, waving, flailing, or performing any other means of wild gesticulation, lest the puff be lost for eternity.

name: Demon Box

sources.text: Attend a Ceremony of Eternal Bonding (Gold/Platinum)

description: Summon your demon box minion. There is no better way to tell a special someone “Thank you for attending my Ceremony of Eternal Bonding” than by giving them a sentient box that may or may not devour their pets.

name: Hoary the Snowman
description: Summon your Hoary the Snowman minion. Hoary the Snowman was a jolly happy soul, without a pipe, and without a nose, and two eyes made out of something other than coal. Probably slag.

name: Wind-up Nanamo
description: Summon your wind-up Nanamo minion. She vehemently refuses to sit upon any shoulder but Raubahn's...and yours.

name: Wind-up Urianger
description: Summon your wind-up Urianger minion. When the senary moon did wane, there sounded a garrulous and convoluted monologue. A new minion had roused, one whose identity lieth within our ken.

name: Wind-up Ultros
description: Summon your wind-up Ultros minion. A fraction of the size, yet every bit as annoying as the real thing. Be forewarned: once Ultros shows up, he's liable to stick around.

name: Wind-up Louisoix
description: Summon your wind-up Louisoix minion. The Seventh Astral Era is secure as long as the Archon is ever at our sides.

name: Assassin Fry
description: Summon your assassin fry minion. There was an old betta who swallowed a fry. No one knows why it swallowed the fry, but for some reason, the fry can now fly.

name: Fat Cat
description: Summon your fat cat minion. Despite convincing research by top academics from around the realm and beyond, most Miqo'te scholars refuse to believe that there may be some ancestral connection between their race and cats (fat or not).

name: Nana Bear
description: Summon your Nana bear minion. Pundits claim bears to be the deadliest beasts in the realm─obviously having never stared into *this* cute cub's nebulous eyes.

name: Mummy's Little Mummy

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack

description: Summon your mummy's little mummy minion. While as cute as a button, remember, mummies are ultimately embalmed corpses damned to eternal thralldom in the land of the living. Have fun.

name: Littlefoot
description: Summon your Littlefoot minion. This particular yeti is content in knowing that bigger is not always necessarily better.

name: Tight-beaked Parrot
description: Summon your tight-beaked parrot minion. For best results, summon while wearing an eyepatch.

name: Heavy Hatchling
description: Summon your heavy hatchling minion. Currently, “baby fat” is the prevailing excuse for this cherubic chick's gigant-like girth.

name: Model Enterprise

sources.text: Item code included with The Art of Eorzea -Another Dawn-

description: Summon your model *Enterprise* minion. Designed to boldly go where you have gone before.

name: Wind-up Papalymo
description: Summon your wind-up Papalymo minion. Comes complete with irremovable smirk.

name: Wind-up Yda
description: Summon your wind-up Yda minion. Comes complete with irremovable mask.

name: Wind-up Y'shtola
description: Summon your wind-up Y'shtola minion. If we are to take her word for it, the Circle of Knowing Archon has seen but twenty-three summers.

name: Wind-up Delivery Moogle

sources.text: Item code included with Delivery Moogle Plushie

description: Summon your wind-up delivery moogle minion. For when you absolutely, positively require moogle accompaniment.

name: Wind-up Sea Devil

sources.text: Sahagin Vendor - Novv's Nursery (Western La Noscea) - 25,000 Gil (Rank 8)

description: Summon your wind-up Sea Devil minion. A clockwork automaton expertly crafted to resemble the infamous Scarlet Sea Devil, leader of the Coral Tridents.

name: Wind-up Kobolder

sources.text: Kobold Vendor - 789th Order Dig (Outer La Noscea) - 25,000 Gil (Rank 8)

description: Summon your wind-up kobolder minion. Bolder than a wind-up kobold, yet not any older.

name: Wind-up Ixal
description: Summon your wind-up Ixal minion. He believes he can fly. He believes he can touch the sky. Unfortunately he cannot.

name: Wind-up Dezul Qualan
description: Summon your wind-up Dezul Qualan minion. It is said Ixali engineer Dezul Qualan began crafting war dirigibles after having a vision of ninety-nine red balloons floating over the Black Shroud.

name: Wind-up Founder

sources.text: Amalj'aa Vendor - Ring of Ash (Southern Thanalan) - 25,000 Gil (Rank 8)

description: Summon your wind-up founder minion. Four score and many more years ago, the Amalj'aa founding fathers dreamed of a day when in their footsteps would walk adorable minions. That day has finally come.

name: Wind-up Violet

sources.text: Sylphic Vendor - Little Solace (East Shroud) - 25,000 Gil (Rank 8)

description: Summon your wind-up Violet minion. Touched by a primal and corrupted to the core...yet adorable nonetheless.

name: Wind-up Onion Knight
description: Summon your magic wind-up onion knight minion. An accurate representation of the soldiers who once made up the greater portion of the Allagan Imperial Army.

name: Miniature Minecart
description: Summon your miniature minecart minion. Best when ridden in abandoned mines and temples of doom.

name: Wind-up Gilgamesh
description: Summon your wind-up Gilgamesh minion. Several arms appear to be missing, but that does not seem to otherwise hinder basic functionality.

name: Wind-up Thancred
description: Summon your wind-up Thancred minion. 200% more dreamy than previous models.

name: Wind-up Minfilia
description: Summon your wind-up Minfilia minion. Unlike the real Minfilia, this one actually accompanies you on your adventures.

name: Wind-up Goblin
description: Summon your wind-up goblin minion. Even this automaton's gobbiebag is bigger than yours.

name: Nutkin

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack

description: Summon your nutkin minion. That nutkins are infamous for being shy and timid creatures shows that this brave beastkin comes complete with a pair of iron acorns on him.

name: Tiny Tapir
description: Summon your tiny tapir minion. Natives of the New World claim that tapirs grow by devouring the dreams of their unsuspecting owners. And now you know what to expect.

name: Naughty Nanka
description: Summon your naughty nanka minion. Like its parent, the ninki nanka, this slippery wavekin will breed like a rabbit if left unsupervised.

name: Treasure Box

sources.text: Hunt Billmaster - Any Grand Company Headquarters - 440 Allied Seals

description: Summon your treasure box minion. It is unknown what manner of spirit possesses this tiny treasure chest, but the fact that it will not hesitate to nip at the fingers of any who try and pry it open is painfully evident.

name: Zu Hatchling
description: Summon your zu hatchling minion. This newborn zu has yet to exhibit aggressive or territorial behavior, but when it gets bigger...

name: Wind-up Succubus

sources.text: Hunt Billmaster - Any Grand Company Headquarters - 500 Allied Seals

description: Summon your wind-up succubus minion. 100% anatomically correct. Handle with tender loving care.

name: Mini Mole
description: Summon your mini mole minion. When not dining on a protein-rich diet of earthworms and grubs, he dreams of making mountains.

name: Mandragora Queen
description: Though wed to the Tomato King in a move to strengthen the bond of houses Tomato and Mandragora, the queen longs to steal away with her one true love─the Eggplant Knight. What will become of this forbidden romance!? Summon the Mandragora Queen minion today and find out!

name: Tomato King
description: Summon your Tomato King minion. Has issued a royal decree for the public defenestration of any and all who mistakenly claim the king is a vegetable.

name: Garlic Jester
description: Summon your Garlic Jester minion. Every breath you take will act as a reminder that your pungent pal is right behind you.

name: Eggplant Knight
description: Summon your Eggplant Knight minion. His childhood dream to become a wizard was frowned upon by his overbearing father.

name: Onion Prince
description: Summon your Onion Prince minion. He would die 4 U. Or possibly cry 4 U. Or most likely make U cry. 4 U.

name: Fledgling Apkallu

sources.text: Out of Sight Out of Mind

description: Summon your fledgling apkallu minion. Will follow you until you give him a fish. Will continue to follow you after being given a fish.

name: Wind-up Warrior of Light
description: Summon your wind-up Warrior of Light minion. “Wheresoever thou goest, so too shall Light follow.” ─Ancient benediction

name: Magic Broom
description: Summon your magic broom minion. For safety reasons, do not fall asleep while it is at work.

name: Plush Cushion
description: Summon your plush cushion minion. Ever ready to shield your buttocks from the hardest of places.

name: Wind-up Sun

sources.text: Magic Pot - The Isles of Umbra (Western La Noscea) - 1 Elixir

description: Summon your wind-up sun minion. May the sun never go down on you.  /poke to adjust elevation.

name: Wind-up Odin
description: Summon your wind-up Odin minion. Guaranteed not to wipe out your entire party in one fell stroke.

name: Wind-up Sahagin

sources.text: Sahagin Vendor - Novv's Nursery (Western La Noscea) - 25,000 Gil (Rank 4)

description: Summon your wind-up Sahagin minion. He's got a trident and he's not afraid to use it.

name: Wind-up Kobold

sources.text: Kobold Vendor - 789th Order Dig (Outer La Noscea) - 25,000 Gil (Rank 4)

description: Summon your wind-up kobold minion. With you, she will koboldly go where no kobold has gone before.

name: Wind-up Bahamut

sources.text: Item code included with A Realm Reborn Original Soundtrack

description: Summon your wind-up Bahamut minion. This mysterious being emerged from within a broken wind-up Dalamud, and is nigh inseparable from its former prison.

name: Baby Opo-opo

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack

description: Summon your baby opo-opo minion. The only thing he loves more than you is a juicy sprite apple.

name: Minute Mindflayer

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack

description: Summon your minute mindflayer minion. Delights folk with its cuteness even as it fills them with an inexplicable sense of dread.

name: Wind-up Moogle
description: Summon your wind-up moogle minion. With its button nose and fluffy pom, this clockwork moogle will make you the envy of all your friends.

name: Wind-up Brickman
description: Summon your wind-up brickman minion. The brickman gets up and looks over as if it wants to join the party!

name: Wind-up Shantotto
description: Summon your wind-up Shantotto minion. But remember: If you fail to treat her right, she will set your pants alight.

name: Minion of Light
description: Summon your Minion of Light and make true the prophecy: “When Darkness veils the world, three Minions of Light shall come.”

name: Wind-up Edvya
description: Summon your wind-up Edvya minion. Sometimes moonlights as a miller girl, much to her father the sultan's chagrin.

name: Wind-up Leader
description: Summon your wind-up leader minion, who will follow you unquestioningly─for coin and country; for serenity, purity, sanctity─till sea swallows all.

name: Wind-up Amalj'aa

sources.text: Amalj'aa Vendor - Ring of Ash (Southern Thanalan) - 25,000 Gil (Rank 4)

description: Summon your wind-up Amalj'aa minion. What is burnt may never burn, but rises again, harder and stronger.

name: Wind-up Sylph

sources.text: Sylphic Vendor - Little Solace (East Shroud) - 25,000 Gil (Rank 4)

description: Summon your wind-up sylph minion. If he could speak, it would be in the third person.

name: Bluebird

sources.text: The Palace of the Dead - Bronze Sack
